title: T-084 — narrow tenant_idp_config grants (column-level or service-role-only) (FT-024)
prompt:
# T-084 — narrow tenant_idp_config grants (column-level or service-role-only) (FT-024)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §8.x
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-024** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P1** (S effort)

## Goal
Column-level GRANT (or table split) restricting app-role from reading tenant_idp_config secret columns.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration 032: REVOKE SELECT ON tenant_idp_config FROM app_user; GRANT SELECT (org_id, provider_type, metadata_url, entity_id, jit_provisioning, enforce_for_non_admins, idle_timeout_min, session_max_h, password_complexity, password_expiry_days, org_default_role, enabled) ON tenant_idp_config TO app_user.
2. Service-role retains full SELECT.
3. Integration test: app-role SELECT * raises SQLSTATE 42501; service-role SELECT * succeeds.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/032-tenant-idp-config-narrow-grants.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/tenant-idp-config-grants.integration.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 032 applied, when an app-role SELECT reads scim_token_hash, then SQLSTATE 42501 is raised.
2. Given an app-role SELECT reads provider_type, then it succeeds.
3. Given a service-role SELECT reads scim_token_hash, then it succeeds.

## Test strategy
- RED: write tenant-idp-config-grants.integration.test.ts asserting all three ACs before migration.
- Pin SQLSTATE 42501.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db migrate && pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test tenant-idp-config-grants`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not expose secret columns to app-role via a view (negates the protection).
- Do not break existing service-role consumers.
- Do not use raw new pg.Pool.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Narrow tenant_idp_config grants so app-role cannot read sensitive secret columns; only service-role may read scim_token_hash + x509_cert.
pipeline_inputs.details: tenant_idp_config holds scim_token_hash and x509_cert which must not be readable by app-role connections. Convert to column-level GRANT or move to a separate `tenant_idp_secrets` table service-role-only.
out_of_scope: Do not move the secrets to a vault in this task.
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 032 applied, when an app-role SELECT reads scim_token_hash, then SQLSTATE 42501 is raised.
Given an app-role SELECT reads provider_type, then it succeeds.
Given a service-role SELECT reads scim_token_hash, then it succeeds.
